title: June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
content:
The Korean Business Research Institute has revealed this month’s brand reputation rankings for actors! The rankings were determined through a data analysis of the media coverage, participation, interaction, and community indexes of 100 actors who appeared in dramas, movies, or OTT content released between May 23 and June 23. Heo Nam Jun, who recently stole… Continue reading June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
The post June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 6月演员品牌声誉排行榜公布，许南俊登顶
facts_list: 韩国企业评价研究所于6月23日发布6月演员品牌声誉排行榜
排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间100名出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的演员的媒体覆盖、参与、互动和社区指数数据分析
许南俊在本次排名中位居榜首
summary_zh: 韩国企业评价研究所公布了6月演员品牌声誉排行榜，该排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间对100名出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的演员进行的媒体覆盖、参与、互动和社区指数数据分析。许南俊在本次排名中位居榜首。

title_zh: BLACKPINK Jennie、BTS、KATSEYE入选Billboard“2026上半年最佳歌曲”榜单
facts_list: Billboard于6月24日发布2026年中期盘点“The 50 Best Songs of 2026 So Far”
BLACKPINK成员Jennie与Tame Impala的合作混音版“Dracula”入选该榜单
BTS和KATSEYE也出现在该榜单中
summary_zh: Billboard于6月24日发布2026年中期最佳歌曲榜单，BLACKPINK成员Jennie与Tame Impala的合作混音版“Dracula”入选，此外BTS和KATSEYE也位列其中。

title: BOYNEXTDOOR, I.O.I, CORTIS, And BTS Top Circle Weekly Charts
content:

Album Chart BOYNEXTDOOR achieved a double crown on this week’s charts, topping both the physical album chart and the digital download chart with their new album “HOME” and its title track “VIRAL.” “HOME,” BOYNEXTDOOR’s first studio album, swept the top… Continue reading BOYNEXTDOOR, I.O.I, CORTIS, And BTS Top Circle Weekly Charts
